inbox.description: Base directory new media lands in (absolute or ~). Each move's 'src' is relative to this.

library.description: Sorted library root (absolute or ~). Each move's 'dest' is relative to this.

moves.description: Relocations to perform, in order. May be empty (nothing to sort).

src.description: File or directory within the inbox to move. Relative only: no leading slash, no '..' segment.

dest.description: Destination within the library, including the final folder/filename. Relative only: no leading slash, no '..' segment.
